INSERT INTO xml_col_test_1 (id, txt, xmltxt)
  VALUES (1, 'test1', '<xml><test>val1</test></xml>');

INSERT INTO xml_col_test_1 (id, txt, xmltxt)
  VALUES (2, 'test2', xml_tree_doc('<xml><test>val2</test><more><item>item1</item></more></xml>'));

INSERT INTO xml_col_test_1 (id, txt, xmltxt)
  VALUES (3, 'test3', xml_tree_doc('<xml><test>val3</test><more><item>item2</item><item>item3</item></more></xml>'));
SELECT * FROM xml_col_test_1;

INSERT INTO xml_col_test_2 (id, txt, xmltxt)
  VALUES (4, 'test4', '<xml><data att="value"><child>child1</child></data></xml>');

INSERT INTO xml_col_test_2 (id, txt, xmltxt)
  VALUES (5, 'test5', xml_tree_doc('<xml><data att="value2"><child>child2</child><child>child3</child></data></xml>'));
SELECT t1.id, t1.txt, t2.txt, t1.xmltxt, t2.xmltxt FROM xml_col_test_1 t1 JOIN xml_col_test_2 t2 ON t1.id = 1;
SELECT COUNT(*), AVG(x.xmltxt) FROM (SELECT id, CAST(xmltxt AS LONG VARCHAR) AS xmltxt FROM xml_col_test_1) AS x;
SELECT id, xmltxt FROM xml_col_test_1 WHERE xmltxt IS NOT NULL;

INSERT INTO xml_col_test_1 (id, txt, xmltxt)
  VALUES (6, 'test6', '<xml><encoding>UTF-8</encoding><data><value>V1</value></data></xml>');
SELECT id, xmltxt FROM xml_col_test_1 WHERE xmltxt LIKE '%<data>%';
INSERT INTO xml_col_test_3 (id, description, xml_content) VALUES (7, 'test7', xml_tree_doc('<root><item>value1</item></root>'));
SELECT * FROM xml_col_test_3 WHERE xml_content WITHIN xml_tree('<root><item>value1</item></root>');
SELECT t3.id, t3.description, t3.xml_content FROM xml_col_test_3 AS t3 WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM xml_col_test_1 AS t1 WHERE t1.id = t3.id);
SELECT t1.id, t1.xmltxt FROM xml_col_test_1 t1 WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM xml_col_test_2 t2 WHERE CAST(t1.xmltxt AS LONG VARCHAR) = CAST(t2.xmltxt AS LONG VARCHAR));
INSERT INTO xml_col_test_4 (id, user_info) VALUES (8, xml_tree_doc('<user><name>John Doe</name><email>john@example.com</email></user>'));
SELECT id, user_info FROM xml_col_test_4 WHERE user_info IS NOT NULL;
